E:\Environment\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\miniDBMS.dir/objects.a
E:\Environment\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\miniDBMS.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\miniDBMS.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\Environment\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\miniDBMS.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o miniDBMS.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libminiDBMS.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\miniDBMS.dir\linkLibs.rsp
